chain.thought: Explanation: On the Billboard Hot 100, only "i like it" peaked at 7 and "romeo" peaked at 6, both within the top 10. All other Billboard Hot 100 entries were outside the top 10 or did not chart. Therefore, 2 singles reached the top 10.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
Count only entries on the Billboard Hot 100 with positions 1–10. The Billboard Hot 100 entries are:
- "summergirls" (#50) – not top 10
- "24/7" (#42) – not top 10
- "i like it" (#7) – top 10
- "sunshine" (#23) – not top 10
- "never 2 much of u" (#61) – not top 10
- "romeo" (#6) – top 10
- "gentle" (#31) – not top 10
- "ooh child" (#27) – not top 10
- "endlessly" (--) – not charted
Thus, 2 singles reached the top 10: "i like it" and "romeo".
